reviews.comment:
El servicompras es muy caro pero tiene un lindo Parador y es el punto medio central de cualquier punto cardinal de Nqn

(Translated by Google)
The convenience store is very expensive but it has a nice rest stop and is the central midpoint for any cardinal point in Neuquén.

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para descansar durante tu viaje. Baños para discapacitados y especiales para socios del ACA. Tiene servicio de buffet. Cabe aclarar que sus precios son un tanto elevados, para quiénes no son socios del ACA. Venden artesanías y una​ hermosa terraza para disfrutar de un buen café, mientras descansas del viaje que estás realizando.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to rest during your trip. Accessible restrooms and special restrooms for ACA members. Buffet service is available. It's worth noting that the prices are a bit high for non-ACA members. They sell handicrafts and have a lovely terrace where you can enjoy a good coffee while you rest from your trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNjZ5S293RRAB
